title: ollama/ollama
summary: Official Ollama repository providing the CLI and Go server to pull and run LLMs locally.

title: ollama-python
summary: Official Python client for Ollama’s REST API with sync/async support.

title: ollama-js
summary: Official JavaScript/TypeScript client for browsers & Node.js.

title: langchain-ollama
summary: LangChain integration letting you use Ollama models as LLM or chat components.

title: ollama-webui
summary: Open-source ChatGPT-style web UI that connects to a local Ollama instance.

title: ollama4j
summary: Java/Kotlin client for Ollama with fluent builder API and Spring Boot starters.

title: ollama-rb
summary: Official Ruby gem for interacting with the Ollama REST API.

title: ollama-cli
summary: Rust-based CLI that wraps Ollama with extra conveniences like chat history.

title: ollama-copilot
summary: VS Code extension that brings local Ollama completions inline like GitHub Copilot.

title: ollama-haystack
summary: Haystack integration by deepset to use Ollama models in RAG pipelines.

title: ollama-n8n-node
summary: n8n community node that lets workflows call Ollama models via no-code blocks.

title: ollama-csharp
summary: Community-maintained C# / .NET client for Ollama with async I/O.

title: ollama-docker
summary: Official Docker image and compose stacks for CPU & GPU deployments.

title: ollama-helm
summary: Helm chart to deploy Ollama on Kubernetes with autoscaling and PVC support.

title: ollama-chatbot-ui
summary: Minimal React chatbot frontend that streams responses from Ollama.

title: ollama-rag
summary: Simple RAG template using Ollama embeddings + Chroma vector store.

title: ollama-discord
summary: Self-hostable Discord bot that chats powered by any Ollama model.

title: ollama-macos-menu
summary: Native macOS menu-bar app to start/stop Ollama services and switch models.

title: ollama-obsidian
summary: Obsidian plugin that adds an Ollama sidebar for AI-assisted note writing.

title: ollama-npm
summary: Official npm package distributing the ollama-js client.
